root.rep_text: หนังสือแจ้งให้เปลี่ยนผู้ค้ำประกัน
root.sql:
select tab.*, ( (select prename from sc_mem_m_ucf_prename,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_ucf_prename.prename_code = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.prename_code and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) || (select member_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) || ' ' || (select member_surname from sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no) ) as member_name, ( select member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group , sc_mem_m_membership_registered where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = tab.membership_no ) as member_group_name, ( select count(sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) from sc_lon_m_contract_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = tab.loan_contract_no ) as count_coll, ( (select lpad((last_document_no + (tab.row_no - 1 )),6,'0') from sc_cnt_m_document_no_control where document_code = 'BOOKCHANGECOLL') || ' / ' || (select document_year from sc_cnt_m_document_no_control where document_code = 'BOOKCHANGECOLL') ) as doc_no from ( select sum(1) over(order by sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as row_no, sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no, sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no, sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract, (select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as as_name, (select sysdate from dual) as today, ( select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name from sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_contract where ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_type_code = '01' ) and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance > 0 ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' OR sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status is null) and ( not exists (select null from sc_lon_m_rule where sc_lon_m_rule.loan_tran_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) ) /*--Test Case--*/ -- and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '053785' ) -- and ( sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = '262009938' ) /*WHERE*/
order by sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ASC, sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no ASC ) tab

r_ktm_req_change_coll_format03_new_nest.sql:
select sum(1) over (order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) as row_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = mem_coll.member_group_no ) as member_group_name
from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered mem_reg, sc_mem_m_membership_registered mem_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = mem_reg.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = mem_coll.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and mem_coll.member_group_no not in ('610000','620000') and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ -- and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = '045401156'

r_ktm_req_change_coll_format03_new_resig.sql: select (sum(1) over (order by sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no) ) as row_no, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.collateral_description, sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no, (select sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name from sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = mem_coll.member_group_no) as member_group_name from sc_lon_m_contract_coll, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_membership_registered mem_reg, sc_mem_m_membership_registered mem_coll where sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = mem_reg.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.ref_own_no = mem_coll.membership_no and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.status = '0' and mem_coll.member_group_no in ('610000','620000') and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = {0} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract_coll.loan_contract_no = '015601312'
